title: Origins of the UV continuum and Balmer emission lines in Little Red Dots: observational validation of dense gas envelope models enshrouding the AGN
comment: Submitted to ApJL. Comments are welcome
summary: We present a statistical study on the origins of the UV continuum and narrow/broad emission lines in little red dots (LRDs), a newly discovered class of active galactic nuclei (AGNs). Leveraging all archived JWST/NIRSpec data, we build a sample of 28 spectroscopically-confirmed LRDs at $5<z_{\rm spec}<7.2$, by requiring broad H$α$ emission, blue UV colors, V-shaped continua, and compact morphologies. We define a control sample of 9 blue, compact, broad-line AGNs without red optical continua (hereafter little blue dots; LBDs), and examine correlations between rest UV and the narrow/broad H$α$ luminosities in these populations. In LRDs, both narrow and broad H$α$ components are tightly correlated with the UV continuum, and the luminosity ratios are consistent with those in young starburst galaxies. In contrast, the UV to broad H$α$ ratios in LBDs closely match local unobscured AGNs and are statistically different from LRDs. The Ly$α$ occurrence rates and strengths do not differ between LRDs and LBDs and are comparable to normal star-forming galaxies. These results are consistent with a scenario where the central BH in LRDs is enshrouded by a dense opaque gas envelope -- in this model, the UV continuum as well as narrow and even broad H$α$ emissions are not powered by AGNs but predominantly by young massive stars surrounding the envelope, while the envelope radiates as a $\sim 5000$ K blackbody. As the envelope dissipates, direct AGN emission can emerge, potentially transforming LRDs into LBDs and marking the end of a short-lived phase of rapid black hole growth.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过JWST/NIRSpec数据分析了"小红点"（LRDs）的UV连续谱和窄/宽发射线起源，发现LRDs中的UV和Hα发射主要来自年轻大质量恒星而非活动星系核，支持LRDs是中心黑洞被稠密气体包层包裹的短寿命快速生长阶段。

AI.method: 利用所有存档的JWST/NIRSpec数据，构建了28个红移5-7.2的光谱确认LRDs样本，要求具有宽Hα发射、蓝色UV颜色、V形连续谱和致密形态。同时定义了9个没有红色光学连续谱的蓝色致密宽线AGN作为对照样本（LBDs），分析UV与窄/宽Hα光度之间的相关性。

AI.conclusion: 结果支持LRDs中心黑洞被稠密不透明气体包层包裹的模型：UV连续谱以及窄甚至宽Hα发射主要由包层周围的年轻大质量恒星提供，而非AGN本身。随着包层消散，直接AGN辐射可能显现，LRDs可能转变为LBDs，标志着黑洞快速生长的短寿命阶段结束。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Schematic pictures of AGN+dense gas envelope models (also known as BH* models) for LRDs proposed in literature. (a) K. Inayoshi et al. ( 2025a ) proposed a model where the central BH is enshrouded by thick gas envelope. Since its optically thickness, no radiation from the AGN accretion can be escaped, and the envelope is thermalized and observed as a blackbody. In this model, all UV light, narrow lines, and broad lines are powered by young massive stars surrounding the envelope, and the rest optical continuum is explained by the thermal emission. (b) the cocoon envelope model originally proposed by R. P. Naidu et al. ( 2025 ) has a layered cocoon around the central BH. The broad lines are originated from the inner layer, which is illuminated by the accretion disk, and leak out after multiple scatterings through the outer layer. The cocoon is optically thick for UV continuum, and the UV light and narrow line in LRDs needs to be emitted from host galaxies. The rest optical continuum in this model originated either from the Balmer limit photon absorption by the cocoon or from the thermal emission of the cocoon heated by the AGN accretion. (c) when the dense envelope around the central BH is not spherical and is not optically thick towards the polar axis (e.g., X. Lin et al., 2025 ) , all UV light, narrow, and broad lines can be from the AGN accretion. This is similar to the standard AGN picture, but it lacks the dust torus and instead has a non-spherical envelope which emits blackbody thermal emission in the rest optical.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：文献中提出的LRDs的AGN+稠密气体包层模型（也称为BH*模型）示意图。(a) K. Inayoshi et al. ( 2025a ) 提出了一个模型，其中中心BH被厚气体包层包裹。由于其光学厚度，来自AGN吸积的辐射无法逃逸，包层被热化并作为黑体被观测到。在该模型中，所有紫外光、窄线和宽线均由包层周围的年轻大质量恒星提供能量，而静止光学连续谱则由热辐射解释。(b) 最初由R. P. Naidu et al. ( 2025 ) 提出的茧状包层模型在中心BH周围有一个分层茧。宽线起源于内层，由吸积盘照亮，并经过外层多次散射后泄漏出来。茧对紫外连续谱是光学厚的，LRDs中的紫外光和窄线需要由宿主星系发射。该模型中的静止光学连续谱要么源于茧对Balmer极限光子的吸收，要么源于被AGN吸积加热的茧的热辐射。(c) 当中心BH周围的稠密包层不是球对称且对极轴方向不是光学厚时（例如，X. Lin et al., 2025 ），所有紫外光、窄线和宽线都可以来自AGN吸积。这与标准AGN图像类似，但缺少尘埃环，取而代之的是一个非球对称包层，该包层在静止光学波段发射黑体热辐射。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Rest UV versus H \(\alpha\) line luminosity in LRDs (top) and LBDs (bottom). Broad and narrow components are displayed on the left and right, respectively. Plots are color-coded by the Balmer break strength, defined as \(f_{\nu,4230}/f_{\nu,3560}\) . As a reference, the UV-to-H \(\alpha\) luminosity ratios for young starburst galaxies (black dotted line) and typical Type 1 AGNs (red solid line) are also shown. The gray shaded band shows the range of the luminosity ratio when the stellar age and gas density is varied for young star-forming galaxies.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：LRDs（顶部）和LBDs（底部）中静止系紫外光度与Hα线光度的关系。左侧和右侧分别显示宽分量和窄分量。绘图按Balmer跳变强度进行颜色编码，定义为\(f_{\nu,4230}/f_{\nu,3560}\)。作为参考，还显示了年轻星暴星系（黑色虚线）和典型1型AGN（红色实线）的紫外与Hα光度比。灰色阴影带显示了年轻恒星形成星系中恒星年龄和气体密度变化时光度比的范围。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: The effect of different size-luminosity relation on the BH mass estimation. The figure compares the BH mass estimations of the sample LRDs, assuming the typical \(R_{BLR}\) - \(L\) relation calibrated for AGN accretion disk ( \(x\) -axis) and assuming that BLRs are just at the photospheric radius of the blackbody envelope ( \(y\) -axis). Plots are color-coded by the blackbody temperature ( \(T_{BB}\) ). It demonstrates that using the typical \(R_{BLR}\) - \(L\) relation can overestimate the BH mass by \(\sim 1\) dex due to the different \(R_{BLR}\) estimations.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：不同大小-光度关系对BH质量估计的影响。该图比较了样本LRDs的BH质量估计，假设典型的\(R_{BLR}\) - \(L\)关系（针对AGN吸积盘校准，\(x\)轴）和假设BLR恰好位于黑体包层的光球半径处（\(y\)轴）。绘图按黑体温度（\(T_{BB}\)）进行颜色编码。这表明，由于\(R_{BLR}\)估计不同，使用典型的\(R_{BLR}\) - \(L\)关系可能会将BH质量高估约\(\sim 1\) dex。

title: Caught in Swallowtails: Discovery of Two Swallowtail Image Formations in MS 0451.6-0305
summary: We report the discovery of two swallowtail image formations at $z=2.91$ and $z=6.70$ behind the galaxy cluster MS 0451.6-0305 in JWST-NIRCam imaging. We find that in both of the above lensed systems, the complex image morphology cannot be reproduced by simple fold/cusp caustics, and detailed lens modeling reveals higher-order swallowtail caustic configurations. In the $z=2.91$ lens system, a small part of the source galaxy (which itself is part of a galaxy group) containing atleast two compact knots sits inside the swallowtail caustic, producing a quadruply imaged arc. At two of the image positions of these knots, we infer point source magnifications of $\gtrsim 300$, implying lensing-corrected effective radii of $\lesssim 0.8-1.5$ pc. The $z=6.70$ system exhibits even more complex image formation. We therefore only use the most confidently identified counter-images of knots in this system as constraints in our lens modeling. The resulting model predicts magnifications $\sim20-200$ and lensing-corrected effective radii of $\lesssim 0.8-18.5$ pc for various knots. Together, these two systems represent the first example of observations of multiple swallowtail image formations in a single galaxy cluster and demonstrate the ability of swallowtail caustics to magnify individual substructures at sub-parsec scales, from intermediate redshifts to the first billion years of the Universe.

AI.tldr: JWST观测发现MS 0451.6-0305星系团后方存在两个燕子尾状引力透镜系统（z=2.91和z=6.70），首次在单个星系团中观测到多个高阶燕子尾透镜形态，能够将亚秒差距尺度的星系亚结构放大数百倍。
AI.motivation: 研究高阶引力透镜效应，特别是燕子尾状透镜形态，以探测高红移星系中的亚秒差距尺度结构，了解早期宇宙中星系的形成和演化过程。
AI.method: 使用JWST-NIRCam成像观测MS 0451.6-0305星系团，识别复杂的透镜图像形态，通过详细的透镜建模分析高阶燕子尾状透镜配置，计算放大倍数和有效半径。
AI.result: 发现两个燕子尾状透镜系统：z=2.91系统产生四重成像弧，点源放大倍数≥300，透镜校正有效半径≤0.8-1.5 pc；z=6.70系统放大倍数20-200，有效半径≤0.8-18.5 pc。这是首次在单个星系团中观测到多个燕子尾透镜形态。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们报告在JWST-NIRCam成像中，于星系团MS 0451.6-0305后方红移$z=2.91$和$z=6.70$处发现两个燕子尾图像构型。我们发现，在上述两个透镜系统中，复杂的图像形态无法用简单的折叠/尖点焦散线重现，详细的透镜建模揭示了高阶燕子尾焦散线构型。在$z=2.91$透镜系统中，源星系（其本身是一个星系群的一部分）的一小部分包含至少两个致密节点，位于燕子尾焦散线内部，产生了一个四重成像的弧。在这些节点的两个图像位置，我们推断点源放大率$\gtrsim 300$，这意味着透镜校正的有效半径$\lesssim 0.8-1.5$ pc。$z=6.70$系统展现出更为复杂的图像构型。因此，我们仅使用该系统中最可靠识别的节点反像作为透镜建模的约束。所得模型预测各节点的放大率$\sim20-200$，透镜校正的有效半径$\lesssim 0.8-18.5$ pc。这两个系统共同代表了在单个星系团中观测到多个燕子尾图像构型的首个实例，并展示了燕子尾焦散线将亚秒差距尺度的单个子结构从中间红移放大到宇宙最初十亿年的能力。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，燕子尾状透镜能够将亚秒差距尺度的星系亚结构放大数百倍，为研究从中间红移到宇宙最初十亿年的星系形成提供了新的观测手段，展示了高阶引力透镜在探测早期宇宙精细结构中的强大能力。

title: The X-Ray Dot: Exotic Dust or a Late-Stage Little Red Dot?
comment: 21 pages, 7+2 Figures, 1+3 Tables, submitted to AJL. Comments welcome!
summary: JWST's "Little Red Dots" (LRDs) are increasingly interpreted as active galactic nuclei (AGN) obscured by dense thermalized gas rather than dust as evidenced by their X-ray weakness, blackbody-like continua, and Balmer line profiles. A key question is how LRDs connect to standard UV-luminous AGN and whether transitional phases exist and if they are observable. We present the "X-Ray Dot" (XRD), a compact source at $z=3.28$ observed by the NIRSpec WIDE GTO survey. The XRD exhibits LRD hallmarks: a blackbody-like ($T_{\rm eff} \simeq 6400\,$K) red continuum, a faint but blue rest-UV excess, falling mid-IR emission, and broad Balmer lines ($\rm FWHM \sim 2700-3200\,km\,s^{-1}$). Unlike LRDs, however, it is remarkably X-ray luminous ($L_\textrm{2$-$10$\,$keV} = 10^{44.18}\,$erg$\,$s$^{-1}$) and has a continuum inflection that is bluewards of the Balmer limit. We find that the red rest-optical and blue mid-IR continuum cannot be reproduced by standard dust-attenuated AGN models without invoking extremely steep extinction curves, nor can the weak mid-IR emission be reconciled with well-established X-ray--torus scaling relations. We therefore consider an alternative scenario: the XRD may be an LRD in transition, where the gas envelope dominates the optical continuum but optically thin sightlines allow X-rays to escape. The XRD may thus provide a physical link between LRDs and standard AGN, offering direct evidence that LRDs are powered by supermassive black holes and providing insight into their accretion properties.

AI.tldr: JWST观测到一个特殊天体"X射线点源"，它同时具有"小红点"AGN的特征（黑体连续谱、宽巴耳末线）和标准AGN的X射线光度，可能是两种AGN类型之间的过渡阶段。
AI.motivation: 研究JWST发现的"小红点"AGN与标准紫外明亮AGN之间的物理联系，探索是否存在可观测的过渡阶段，以理解这些天体的本质和吸积特性。
AI.method: 使用NIRSpec WIDE GTO巡天数据，分析红移z=3.28的"X射线点源"的光谱特性，包括连续谱形状、巴耳末线轮廓、X射线光度等，并与标准尘埃衰减AGN模型和X射线-环面标度关系进行比较。
AI.result: 发现该天体同时具有小红点AGN特征（黑体连续谱、宽巴耳末线）和标准AGN的强X射线辐射，传统尘埃衰减模型无法解释其光谱特性，表明可能是气体包层主导光学连续谱但允许X射线逃逸的过渡阶段。
AI.conclusion: X射线点源可能是小红点AGN向标准AGN过渡的中间阶段，为理解两种AGN类型的物理联系提供了直接证据，表明小红点AGN确实由超大质量黑洞驱动，并揭示了其吸积特性。

artifacts.abstract_zh: JWST的“小红点”（LRDs）越来越多地被解释为被稠密热化气体而非尘埃遮蔽的活动星系核（AGN），其证据包括X射线弱、类黑体连续谱和巴耳末线轮廓。一个关键问题是LRDs如何与标准的紫外明亮AGN相联系，以及是否存在可观测的过渡阶段。我们展示了“X射线点源”（XRD），一个由NIRSpec WIDE GTO巡天观测到的红移$z=3.28$的致密源。XRD具有LRD的特征：类黑体（$T_{\rm eff} \simeq 6400\,$K）红色连续谱、微弱但蓝色的静止紫外超、下降的中红外辐射以及宽巴耳末线（$\rm FWHM \sim 2700-3200\,km\,s^{-1}$）。然而，与LRDs不同的是，它异常地X射线明亮（$L_\textrm{2$-$10$\,$keV} = 10^{44.18}\,$erg$\,$s$^{-1}$）并且连续谱在巴耳末限蓝侧存在拐折。我们发现，红色静止光学和蓝色中红外连续谱无法用标准的尘埃消光AGN模型重现，除非采用极其陡峭的消光曲线，并且微弱的中红外发射也无法与已建立的X射线–环面标度关系相协调。因此，我们考虑另一种情景：XRD可能是一个处于过渡阶段的LRD，其中气体包层主导光学连续谱，但光学薄的视线允许X射线逃逸。因此，XRD可能为LRDs与标准AGN之间提供了物理联系，直接证明了LRDs由超大质量黑洞驱动，并揭示了其吸积特性。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，X射线点源可能是小红点AGN向标准AGN过渡的中间阶段，为理解两种AGN类型的物理联系提供了直接证据，表明小红点AGN确实由超大质量黑洞驱动，并揭示了其吸积特性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Overview of observations for the X-Ray Dot (XRD). Top panels present the space-based imaging compiled from the 3DHST survey from HST and Spitzer, the RGB composite from HST, and the hard and soft X-ray cutouts from Chandra. HST/Spitzer panels show the \(4^{\prime\prime}\times 4^{\prime\prime}\) cutout in the band, magnitude, and S/N whereas the Chandra panels show \(8^{\prime\prime}\times 8^{\prime\prime}\) cutouts. The bottom panel compares the XRD photometry and scaled spectrum (black) to an LRD with a similar rest-optical continuum (RUBIES \(-\) UDS \(-\) 144195, red) and to the STScI composite quasar spectrum derived from D. E. Vanden Berk et al. ( 2001 ) and E. Glikman et al. ( 2006 ) shown unattenuated (blue) and extincted (purple; \(A_{V}=1.37\) ) by an SMC-like dust law (K. D. Gordon et al., 2003 ) . Comparison spectra are normalized to the XRD scaled spectrum at rest 5500Å.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：X射线点源（XRD）观测概览。上面板展示了来自HST和Spitzer的3DHST巡天的空间成像、HST的RGB合成图以及Chandra的硬X射线和软X射线截取图。HST/Spitzer面板显示了波段、星等和信噪比下的\(4^{\prime\prime}\times 4^{\prime\prime}\)截取图，而Chandra面板显示了\(8^{\prime\prime}\times 8^{\prime\prime}\)截取图。下面板将XRD测光和缩放光谱（黑色）与具有相似静止光学连续谱的LRD（RUBIES \(-\) UDS \(-\) 144195，红色）以及来自D. E. Vanden Berk等人（2001）和E. Glikman等人（2006）的STScI复合类星体光谱（未消光显示为蓝色，经SMC型尘埃律（K. D. Gordon等人，2003）消光显示为紫色，\(A_{V}=1.37\)）进行比较。比较光谱在静止波长5500Å处归一化到XRD缩放光谱。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Zoom-in on the H \(\alpha\) emission line in the PRISM (top) and G235H (bottom) spectra. The observed data are shown in black with 1 \(\sigma\) uncertainties in grey. We overplot the best-fit unite models using a Gaussian narrow plus different broad line profiles: Gaussian (red), exponential (orange), and Lorentzian (yellow). The fit strongly prefers exponential and Lorentzian profiles, suggesting extended wings.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：PRISM（上）和G235H（下）光谱中H \(\alpha\)发射线的放大图。观测数据以黑色显示，1 \(\sigma\)不确定度以灰色显示。我们叠加了使用高斯窄线加上不同宽线轮廓的最佳拟合unite模型：高斯（红色）、指数（橙色）和洛伦兹（黄色）。拟合强烈偏好指数和洛伦兹轮廓，表明存在延伸的翼。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Top: The rest-frame SED of the XRD (black) compared to RUBIES-BLAGN-1 (green; B. Wang et al., 2025 ) and Forge I and II (red and blue respectively; S. Fu et al., 2025 ) . Bottom Left: \(L_{2,keV}\) versus \(L_{2500\mathring{A}}\) for the XRD, the Forges, and the X-ray upper limits for LRDs nondetections from M. Yue et al. ( 2024 ) (grey triangles). The XRD and Forge sources lie well above the standard \(z\simeq 0-3\) AGN relation (M. Chira et al., 2026 ) , indicating they are X-ray luminous for their UV emission. Applying a dust correction (§ III.3 ) to the XRD, along with the corrections for the Forges in S. Fu et al. ( 2025 ) , brings all three sources closer to the relation. Bottom Right: Comparison of X-ray and H \(\alpha\) luminosity. The measured XRD properties follow the relation for \(z (C. Jin et al., 2012 ) , but correcting the H \(\alpha\) luminosity for dust in the same manner as \(L_{2500\mathring{A}}\) produces an H \(\alpha\) luminosity that is overluminous for its X-ray emission.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：上：XRD的静止系SED（黑色）与RUBIES-BLAGN-1（绿色；B. Wang等人，2025）以及Forge I和II（分别为红色和蓝色；S. Fu等人，2025）的比较。左下：\(L_{2,keV}\)与\(L_{2500\mathring{A}}\)的关系，显示XRD、Forges以及来自M. Yue等人（2024）的LRD未探测X射线上限（灰色三角形）。XRD和Forges源远高于标准\(z\simeq 0-3\) AGN关系（M. Chira等人，2026），表明它们对于其紫外发射而言X射线明亮。对XRD应用尘埃校正（§ III.3），以及对S. Fu等人（2025）中Forges的校正，使所有三个源更接近该关系。右下：X射线与H \(\alpha\)光度的比较。测量的XRD性质遵循\(z\)的关系（C. Jin等人，2012），但以与\(L_{2500\mathring{A}}\)相同的方式对H \(\alpha\)光度进行尘埃校正后，产生的H \(\alpha\)光度相对于其X射线发射显得过亮。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: X-ray through sub-mm SED fitting of the XRD with both CIGALE (green) and AGNFitter (pink). The top panel shows the best fits (solid) decomposed into their AGN (dashed) and stellar (dotted) components along with the scaled residuals. The bottom panels compares the models, scaled and convolved to the PRISM resolution, to the PRISM spectrum; note that the models are not fit to the spectral data. In order to explain the X-ray luminosity, both models require a strong AGN component. However, to minimize discrepancy with the relatively weak mid-IR flux, CIGALE heavily obscures the AGN component, requiring an evolved stellar population to dominate in the rest-optical, inconsistent with the spectrum. AGNFitter on the other hand is able to fit the rest-optical spectrum with an AGN, but substantially overpredicts in the mid-IR.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：使用CIGALE（绿色）和AGNFitter（粉色）对XRD进行X射线至亚毫米波段的SED拟合。上面板显示了最佳拟合（实线）分解为AGN（虚线）和恒星（点线）分量以及缩放残差。下面板将模型缩放并卷积到PRISM分辨率后与PRISM光谱进行比较；注意模型未拟合光谱数据。为了解释X射线光度，两个模型都需要一个强的AGN分量。然而，为了最小化与相对较弱的中红外通量的差异，CIGALE严重遮蔽了AGN分量，需要演化恒星群体在静止光学波段主导，这与光谱不一致。另一方面，AGNFitter能够用AGN拟合静止光学光谱，但在中红外波段显著高估。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Following the approach of Y. Ma et al. ( 2025b ) , we attempt to model the PRISM spectrum of the LRD assuming it is dominated by a dust-extincted, intrinsically UV-luminous, AGN. We attenuate the M. J. Temple et al. ( 2021 ) AGN–power-law continuum using a flexible S. Noll et al. ( 2009 ) attenuation law plus an unattenuated reflection component. Although we obtain a good fit to the PRISM data, the necessary extinction ( \(A_{V}\sim 1.8\) ) implies a Balmer decrement ( \(H\alpha/H\beta\sim 6-7\) ) that is significantly smaller than the measured value ( \(9.5\pm 0.5\) ). The left panel shows the best-fit attenuated AGN model (orange) decomposed into the intrinsic (blue), reflected (cyan), and extincted (red) components. The right panel compares the derived extinction parameters to typical galaxy populations (J. Chevallard et al., 2013 ; S. Salim et al., 2018 ) , the Large Magellanic Cloud and Milky Way (LMC & MW; K. title: Active Galactic Nuclei and STaR fOrmation in Nearby Galaxies (AGNSTRONG). II: Results for Jetted Type-I AGNs with Strong Ionized Gas Outflows
summary: We investigate the correlation between ionized gas outflows, jets, and star formation in a sample of 42 local type-I active galactic nuclei (AGNs) exhibiting significant [O III] outflows. This study uses both new submillimeter (sub-mm) observations and archival data from the James Clerk Maxwell Telescope. Our analysis, which includes a correction for jet emission in the sub-mm bands, fitting spectral energy distribution, and analyzing spectra, enables us to derive star-formation rates (SFRs) through various methods. By comparing radio power and SFRs, we select a sub-sample of jetted AGNs of which radio emission is mostly from the jets. We find that jetted AGNs predominantly lie above the main sequence of star-forming galaxies, suggesting a correlation between jet activity and star formation. By comparing dust extinction, we demonstrate that jetted AGNs do not have more dust which is the fuel of both star formation and AGN activity. Therefore, this correlation is more likely to arise from AGN feedback. We also find that the Eddington ratio does not impact the specific SFRs (sSFRs) of our sample. Additionally, for jetted AGNs, stronger radio emission corresponds to higher sSFRs, suggesting that jet emission may promote star formation, i.e., positive feedback. Our results not only shed light on the feedback mechanisms of AGNs but also underscore the complex interplay between black hole activity and star formation in galaxy evolution.

AI.tldr: 研究42个具有显著[O III]外流的本地I型活动星系核，发现喷流AGN主要位于恒星形成星系主序列之上，表明喷流活动与恒星形成相关，且更强的射电辐射对应更高的特定恒星形成率，支持喷流可能促进恒星形成的正反馈机制。
AI.motivation: 研究活动星系核中电离气体外流、喷流与恒星形成之间的相关性，以理解黑洞活动与星系演化中的复杂相互作用和反馈机制。
AI.method: 使用新的亚毫米波观测和詹姆斯·克拉克·麦克斯韦望远镜的存档数据，通过校正亚毫米波段的喷流发射、拟合光谱能量分布和分析光谱，采用多种方法推导恒星形成率，并通过比较射电功率和恒星形成率选择喷流AGN子样本。
AI.result: 喷流AGN主要位于恒星形成星系主序列之上，表明喷流活动与恒星形成相关；喷流AGN没有更多的尘埃（恒星形成和AGN活动的燃料）；爱丁顿比对特定恒星形成率无影响；对于喷流AGN，更强的射电辐射对应更高的特定恒星形成率，表明喷流可能促进恒星形成。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了AGN反馈机制，强调了黑洞活动与恒星形成在星系演化中的复杂相互作用，喷流可能通过正反馈促进恒星形成。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们研究了一个包含42个本地I型活动星系核（AGN）的样本中电离气体外流、喷流和恒星形成之间的相关性，这些AGN表现出显著的[O III]外流。本研究使用了来自詹姆斯·克拉克·麦克斯韦望远镜的新亚毫米波观测数据和档案数据。我们的分析包括对亚毫米波段喷流发射的校正、光谱能量分布拟合以及光谱分析，使我们能够通过多种方法推导出恒星形成率（SFR）。通过比较射电功率和SFR，我们选择了一个射电发射主要来自喷流的喷流AGN子样本。我们发现喷流AGN主要位于恒星形成星系主序带之上，表明喷流活动与恒星形成之间存在相关性。通过比较尘埃消光，我们证明喷流AGN并没有更多的尘埃（恒星形成和AGN活动的燃料）。因此，这种相关性更可能源于AGN反馈。我们还发现爱丁顿比率不影响我们样本的比恒星形成率（sSFR）。此外，对于喷流AGN，更强的射电发射对应更高的sSFR，表明喷流发射可能促进恒星形成，即正反馈。我们的结果不仅揭示了AGN的反馈机制，还强调了黑洞活动与恒星形成在星系演化中的复杂相互作用。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，研究揭示了AGN反馈机制，强调了黑洞活动与恒星形成在星系演化中的复杂相互作用，喷流可能通过正反馈促进恒星形成。

title: Calibrating Mid-Infrared Emission Features As Diagnostics of Star Formation in Infrared-Luminous Galaxies via Radiative Transfer Modeling
summary: Luminous infrared galaxies are key sites of obscured stellar mass assembly at z > 0.5. Their star formation rates (SFRs) are often estimated using the luminosities of the 6.2 micron and 11.2 micron polycyclic aromatic hydrocarbon (PAH) features, or those of the [Ne II] and [Ne III] fine-structure lines, as they are minimally affected by obscuration. It is uncertain whether the calibration of these features as SFR tracers depends on the starburst bolometric luminosity or the level of Active Galactic Nucleus (AGN) activity. We here investigate the relationship between the luminosities of PAH and Neon lines with star formation rate for highly luminous objects using radiative transfer modeling and archival observations of 42 local Ultraluminous (>= 10^12 L_sun) Infrared Galaxies (ULIRGs). We find that PAH and [Ne II] features arise mainly in star-forming regions, with small contributions from the AGN or host, but that the [Ne III] line has a mixed contribution from both star formation and AGN activity. We present relations between L_PAH and L_NeII, and both starburst luminosity and SFR. We find relations for lower luminosity (L_IR ~= 10^10-10^12 L_sun) systems underestimate the SFRs in local ULIRGs by up to ~1 dex. The 6.2 micron and 11.2 micron PAH features, and the [Ne II] line, are thus good tracers of SFR in ULIRGs. We do not find that a more luminous AGN affects the relationship between SFR and PAH or Neon luminosity, but that it can make PAH emission harder to discern. Our results and derived relations are relevant to studies of star-forming and composite galaxies at z < 3 with the James Webb Space Telescope.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过辐射传输建模和观测数据，分析了PAH特征和Neon发射线作为恒星形成率示踪剂在超亮红外星系中的适用性，发现6.2μm和11.2μm PAH特征以及[Ne II]线是ULIRGs中恒星形成率的良好示踪剂。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是确定PAH特征（6.2μm和11.2μm）和Neon精细结构线（[Ne II]和[Ne III]）作为恒星形成率示踪剂的校准是否依赖于星暴的辐射光度或活动星系核的活动水平，特别是在高光度系统中。
AI.method: 采用辐射传输建模和档案观测数据，分析了42个本地超亮红外星系（ULIRGs，光度≥10^12 L_sun），研究PAH和Neon线光度与恒星形成率之间的关系。
AI.result: 研究发现PAH和[Ne II]特征主要来自恒星形成区域，AGN或宿主星系的贡献很小；而[Ne III]线则同时受到恒星形成和AGN活动的混合贡献。对于低光度系统的现有关系会低估本地ULIRGs的恒星形成率约1个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 6.2μm和11.2μm PAH特征以及[Ne II]线是ULIRGs中恒星形成率的良好示踪剂，AGN光度不影响这些示踪剂与恒星形成率的关系，但可能使PAH发射更难识别。这些结果对JWST研究z<3的恒星形成和复合星系具有重要意义。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 发光红外星系是红移大于0.5处被遮蔽的恒星质量聚集的关键场所。它们的恒星形成率通常通过6.2微米和11.2微米的多环芳烃特征光度，或[Ne II]和[Ne III]精细结构线的光度来估计，因为这些特征受消光影响最小。目前尚不确定这些特征作为恒星形成率示踪剂的校准是否依赖于星暴的辐射光度或活动星系核活动水平。我们在此利用辐射传输模型和对42个本地超亮红外星系（光度≥10^12 L_sun）的档案观测，研究高光度天体中多环芳烃和氖线光度与恒星形成率之间的关系。我们发现多环芳烃和[Ne II]特征主要产生于恒星形成区，来自活动星系核或宿主星系的贡献较小，但[Ne III]线同时来自恒星形成和活动星系核活动的混合贡献。我们给出了L_PAH和L_NeII与星暴光度及恒星形成率之间的关系。我们发现，较低光度（L_IR ~= 10^10-10^12 L_sun）系统的关系会低估本地超亮红外星系中的恒星形成率，低估幅度可达约1 dex。因此，6.2微米和11.2微米的多环芳烃特征以及[Ne II]线是超亮红外星系中恒星形成率的良好示踪剂。我们没有发现更明亮的活动星系核会影响恒星形成率与多环芳烃或氖光度之间的关系，但它可能使多环芳烃发射更难识别。我们的结果和推导的关系对于利用詹姆斯·韦伯空间望远镜研究红移小于3的恒星形成和复合星系具有参考价值。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：6.2μm和11.2μm PAH特征以及[Ne II]线是ULIRGs中恒星形成率的良好示踪剂，AGN光度不影响这些示踪剂与恒星形成率的关系，但可能使PAH发射更难识别。这些结果对JWST研究z<3的恒星形成和复合星系具有重要意义。

title: The influence of magnetic fields in Cloud-Cloud Collisions
comment: 14 pages, 10 figures, submitted to MNRAS Comments are welcome
summary: Cloud-cloud collisions are expected to trigger star formation by compressing gas into dense, gravitationally unstable regions. However, the role of magnetic fields in this process is unclear. We use SPH to model head-on collisions between two uniform density clouds, each with mass $500 \,$M$_{\odot}$, initial radius 2 pc, and embedded in a uniform magnetic field parallel to the collision velocity. As in the nonmagnetic case, the resulting shock-compressed layer fragments into a network of filaments. If the collision is sufficiently slow, the filaments are dragged into radial orientations by non-homologous gravitational contraction, resulting in a $\textit{Hub Filament}$ morphology, which spawns a centrally concentrated monolithic cluster with a broad mass function shaped by competitive accretion and dynamical ejections. If the collision is faster, a $\textit{Spiders Web}$ of intersecting filaments forms, and star-systems condense out in small subclusters, often at the filament intersections; due to their smaller mass reservoirs, and the lower probability of dynamical ejection, the mass function of star-systems formed in these subclusters is narrower. Magnetic fields affect this dichotomy quantitatively by delaying collapse and fragmentation. As a result, the velocity threshold separating $\textit{Hub Filament}$ and $\textit{Spiders Web}$ morphologies is shifted upward in magnetised runs, thereby enlarging the parameter space in which $\textit{Hub Filament}$ morphologies form, and enhancing the likelihood of producing centrally concentrated clusters. Consequently, magnetic fields regulate both the morphology and timing of star formation in cloud-cloud collisions: they broaden filaments, delay the onset of star formation, and promote the formation of $\textit{Hub Filament}$ morphologies, monolithic clusters and high-mass star-systems.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 云-云碰撞预期通过将气体压缩成致密、引力不稳定的区域来触发恒星形成。然而，磁场在这一过程中的作用尚不明确。我们使用SPH模拟了两个均匀密度云之间的对头碰撞，每个云的质量为$500 \,$M$_{\odot}$，初始半径为2 pc，并嵌入一个平行于碰撞速度的均匀磁场中。与非磁化情况类似，产生的激波压缩层碎裂成丝状结构网络。如果碰撞足够慢，丝状结构会因非同源引力收缩而被拖拽成径向取向，形成$\textit{Hub Filament}$形态，进而产生一个中心聚集的单体星团，其质量函数由竞争吸积和动力学抛射塑造。如果碰撞更快，则会形成$\textit{Spiders Web}$状的交叉丝状结构，恒星系统在小的子星团中凝聚，通常位于丝状结构交叉点；由于其质量储备较小且动力学抛射概率较低，这些子星团中形成的恒星系统质量函数较窄。磁场通过延迟坍缩和碎裂过程定量地影响这种二分性。因此，在磁化模拟中，区分$\textit{Hub Filament}$和$\textit{Spiders Web}$形态的速度阈值向上移动，从而扩大了$\textit{Hub Filament}$形态形成的参数空间，并增加了产生中心聚集星团的可能性。因此，磁场调控了云-云碰撞中恒星形成的形态和时序：它们加宽丝状结构、延迟恒星形成的开始时间，并促进$\textit{Hub Filament}$形态、单体星团和高质量恒星系统的形成。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，AI结论为：磁场调控云-云碰撞中的恒星形成形态和时序：加宽丝状结构、延迟恒星形成开始时间、促进Hub Filament形态、单体星团和高质量恒星系统的形成。

title: Effect of Primordial Black Holes on the global 21-cm signal
summary: The 21-cm global signal, a treasure trove of information about the nature of the first luminous sources of the Universe, has traditionally been modelled assuming that these early sources were predominantly star-forming galaxies. However, recent observations by the James Webb Space Telescope (JWST) have revealed several AGNs as early as z ~ 10 - 10.4 . In light of this, it is important to investigate the contribution of such AGNs to the 21-cm signal. Assuming that these AGNs are seeded by Primordial Black Holes (PBHs) and employing an analytical PBH model, consistent with existing cosmological and astrophysical constraints, we show that these exotic objects can have a significant impact on the redshift evolution of the global signal.

AI.tldr: 该研究探讨了早期宇宙中由原初黑洞形成的活动星系核对21厘米全球信号的影响，挑战了传统上认为早期辐射源主要来自恒星形成星系的假设。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 21厘米全球信号是揭示宇宙首批发光源性质的信息宝库，传统上假设这些早期源主要是恒星形成星系。然而，詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜（JWST）的最新观测显示，在红移z ~ 10 - 10.4处存在多个活动星系核（AGN）。鉴于此，研究此类AGN对21厘米信号的贡献具有重要意义。假设这些AGN由原初黑洞（PBH）提供种子，并采用与现有宇宙学和天体物理约束一致的解析PBH模型，我们表明这些奇异天体对全球信号的红移演化可能产生显著影响。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，早期宇宙中的活动星系核，特别是那些由原初黑洞形成的，可能对21厘米全球信号产生重要影响，这挑战了传统模型，并强调了在解释21厘米观测数据时考虑多种辐射源的重要性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Redshift evolution of key quantities that affect the 21-cm signal. The orange, blue, and green curves correspond to contributions from PBH-only , SF-only , and SF+PBH galaxies, respectively. Panel (a) : Intrinsic X-ray emissivity as a function of redshift. In this case, PBH-only dominates over SF-only across the entire redshift range. Panel (b) : Evolution of the Ly- \(\alpha\) background flux. While dominated by PBH-seeded sources for the very early redshift around \(z=30-20\) , the SF-only completely dominates the redshift \(z=20-7\) . Panel (c) : Ionizing photon emissivity, which mimics the Ly- \(\alpha\) background trends.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：影响21厘米信号的关键量的红移演化。橙色、蓝色和绿色曲线分别对应仅PBH、仅SF和SF+PBH星系的贡献。面板(a)：本征X射线发射率随红移的变化。在此情况下，仅PBH在整个红移范围内主导仅SF。面板(b)：Ly-\(\alpha\)背景通量的演化。虽然在红移\(z=30-20\)附近由PBH种子源主导，但仅SF在红移\(z=20-7\)完全主导。面板(c)：电离光子发射率，其趋势与Ly-\(\alpha\)背景相似。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Redshift evolution of the global 21-cm signal for different values of \(f^{PBH}_{X,esc}\) , as indicated in the plots. The blue and green curves correspond to the SF-only and SF+PBH scenarios, respectively. In the leftmost panel, with \(f^{PBH}_{X,esc}=1\) , the SF-only case exhibits a much deeper absorption trough compared to the SF+PBH scenario. This difference arises because the additional X-ray emission from PBH-seeded galaxies heats the intergalactic medium (IGM) more efficiently, thereby reducing the depth of the absorption feature. As \(f^{PBH}_{X,esc}\) decreases (moving towards the right), the X-ray output from PBH-seeded galaxies diminishes, leading to a progressively smaller difference between the two signals. We also note the difference in the signals around \(25\gtrsim z\gtrsim 20\) , and this can be attributed to the fact that SF+PBH produces significantly more Ly- \(\alpha\) photons compared to SF-only model, as is also evident in Panel (b) of 1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：不同\(f^{PBH}_{X,esc}\)值下全球21厘米信号的红移演化，如图中所示。蓝色和绿色曲线分别对应仅SF和SF+PBH情景。在最左侧面板中，\(f^{PBH}_{X,esc}=1\)时，仅SF情况显示出比SF+PBH情景更深的吸收谷。这一差异源于PBH种子星系额外的X射线辐射更有效地加热了星系际介质（IGM），从而减小了吸收特征的深度。随着\(f^{PBH}_{X,esc}\)减小（向右移动），PBH种子星系的X射线输出减弱，导致两个信号之间的差异逐渐缩小。我们还注意到在红移\(25\gtrsim z\gtrsim 20\)附近信号的差异，这可以归因于SF+PBH模型产生的Ly-\(\alpha\)光子显著多于仅SF模型，如图1的面板(b)所示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The redshift evolution of the volume filling factor of HII region, \(Q_{HII}\) . The data points are collected from different observations as mentioned in the text.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：HII区体积填充因子\(Q_{HII}\)的红移演化。数据点来自文中提及的不同观测。
